ogTitle: Wombeyan Caves vs Womboota: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wombeyan Caves and Womboota.
heading: Wombeyan Caves vs Womboota — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wombeyan Caves, New South Wales and Womboota, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wombeyan Caves has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Womboota (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wombeyan Caves or Womboota safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wombeyan Caves has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Womboota scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wombeyan Caves scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Womboota scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wombeyan Caves or Womboota?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wombeyan Caves has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
